title: Domino's Pizza, Inc.'s (DPZ) CEO Russell Weiner on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Domino's Pizza, Inc. (NYSE:DPZ ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Ryan Goers – Vice President-Finance and Investor Relations Russell Weiner – Chief Executive Officer Sandeep Reddy – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Brian Bittner – Oppenheimer David Palmer – Evercore ISI David Tarantino – Baird Brian Mullan – Deutsche Bank John Glass – Morgan Stanley John Ivankoe – JP Morgan Andrew Charles – Cowen & Company Jared Garber – Goldman Sachs Andrew Strelzik – BMO Capital Markets Dennis Geiger – UBS Lauren Silberman – Credit Suisse Chris Carril – RBC Capital Markets Jon Tower – Citi Operator Good day and thank you for standing by. Welcome to Domino's Pizza Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Domino's Pizza misses on profit amid continued driver shortage
text: Domino's Pizza Inc. DPZ, +0.15% reported second-quarter net income totaling $102.5 million, or $2.82 per share, down from $116.6 million, or $3.06 per share, last year. Revenue of $1.065 billion was up from $1.032 billion.

title: Domino's Pizza sales drop less than expected as staffing crunch eases
text: Domino's Pizza Inc reported a smaller-than-expected drop in quarterly U.S. same-store sales on Thursday as it benefited from improved staffing levels, price increases and robust demand for its pizzas and chicken wings.
